case_title: DUAA ELZENELY VS. ITS JUST LUNCH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-21-2016 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DUAA ELZENELY AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MANDY WATSON, OPERATIONS MANAGER FOR IT'S JUST LUNCH. DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE WAS UNWILLING TO STIPULATE TO HAVING THE MATTER HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELZENELY, DUAA AS TO DEFENDANT ITS JUST LUNCH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ITS JUST LUNCH
ORDER CASE DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ELZENELY, DUAA AS TO DEFENDANT ITS JUST LUNCH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED SEP-23-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ITS JUST LUNCH

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DUAA ELZENELY. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ITS JUST LUNCH'S REPRESENTATIVE MANDY WATSON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK S. LE. NOT REPORTED (506)
